name: Portable Export
description: Portable export for offline catalogue access (viewer mode) or full system archive export (re-importable JSON with checksums). Supports CD, USB, ZIP distribution.
author: The Archive and Heritage Group (Pty) Ltd
features: Self-contained HTML/JS viewer for offline catalogue access
Archive export mode: re-importable JSON format with SHA-256 checksums
Full entity coverage: descriptions, authorities, taxonomies, rights, accessions, physical objects, events, notes, relations, repositories
Manifest with checksums for all exported files
Dry-run estimate (record counts + estimated package size)
Export verification CLI: php symfony portable:verify
Export full or partial catalogue (fonds, repository, custom scope)
Edit mode with researcher exchange format
Admin UI with background processing and progress tracking

changelog.2.0.0: Archive export mode with re-importable JSON, manifest checksums, dry-run estimates, verification CLI
changelog.1.1.0: Queue integration, clipboard export, quick-start from description page
changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with full export pipeline and static viewer
